news.t: 3EDGE Asset Management Announces the Launch of Four Actively Managed ETFs

overview.description: The 3EDGE Dynamic Fixed Income ETF (EDGF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that broadly invests in fixed income securities of various maturities and credit quality. The fund dynamically shifts across various debt securities depending on market conditions. EDGF was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by 3Edge.

data.title: 3EDGE Asset Management Announces the Launch of Four Actively Managed ETFs
data.text: NAPLES, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--3EDGE Asset Management, a leader in active and tactical asset management solutions, announced the official launch of its highly anticipated suite of 3EDGE ETFs. Since go...
